title: Sort tasks by Creation Log Date

posts.author: wenzday (wenzday)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have been using todoist for over a decade and recently switched to Monday for the enhanced features and facilitating more communication among the team. It’s surprising how with all the features, some of the more simple things are not present at all.
I found the way to see all the tasks on the “My Work” page but the customizability here is sorely lacking.
Can only sort by status column or date column but not date created??
Why can’t I simply sort the list of tasks by the date they were added?
